pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-A-004 (Security and Privacy/Ability) scores 0.427 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.427) and is edge_case for the Robotics Engineer role. Core role signal: 0 pattern match(es). Seniority is appropriate for this role.
